entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants used for food or industrial purposes

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Multicellular eukaryotes in the kingdom Plantae

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by lack of water

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by high temperatures

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact plants

entities.name: GLOBAL CLIMATE DRIFT
entities.description: Long-term changes in global climate patterns

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The process of increasing in size or development of a plant

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural yield or output

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and produce under water-deficit conditions

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and produce under high-temperature conditions

entities.name: TRANSGENIC TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to introduce foreign genes into an organism

entities.name: RECOMBINANT TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Techniques used to combine DNA from different sources

entities.name: HOMEOSTASIS
entities.description: The maintenance of a stable internal environment

entities.name: PROTEINS
entities.description: Large biomolecules that perform various structural and functional roles in cells

entities.name: PROTEIN KINASES
entities.description: Enzymes that modify other proteins by adding phosphate groups

entities.name: PHOSPHATASES
entities.description: Enzymes that remove phosphate groups from proteins

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins that regulate the transcription of genes

entities.name: LATE EMBRYOGENESIS ABUNDANT PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that protect cells from desiccation during seed maturation and stress

entities.name: DEHYDRINS
entities.description: Proteins that help plants tolerate dehydration

entities.name: OSMOTINS
entities.description: Proteins involved in response to osmotic stress

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that assist in the folding of other proteins under heat stress

entities.name: STRESS SENSORS
entities.description: Proteins that detect environmental stress signals

entities.name: RECEPTORS
entities.description: Proteins that receive chemical signals from the environment

entities.name: CHAPERONES
entities.description: Proteins that assist in the correct folding or unfolding of other proteins
